title: Comment from American Immunization Registry Association, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
Thank you for the opportunity to comment on the Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5) proposed rule. Please find our community's consolidated comments attached. 

Sincerely, 

Mary Beth Kurilo, MPH, MSW
Senior Director of Health Informatics
American Immunization Registry Association (AIRA)
